name: groweasy-csv-importer
description: AI-powered CSV importer that maps arbitrary lead exports onto the GrowEasy CRM schema.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,api,web -c magenta,green,blue "npm run dev -w packages/shared" "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
